name: Admin
description: Full system access including user management and configuration

name: Warehouse Manager
description: Can manage warehouse operations staff assignments and inventory adjustments

name: Inventory Analyst
description: Read and write access to inventory records and reports

name: Receiving Clerk
description: Can process incoming deliveries and update stock levels

name: Shipping Coordinator
description: Can create and manage outbound shipments and dispatch records

name: Forklift Operator
description: Can view bin locations and update movement records

name: Quality Inspector
description: Can flag and quarantine inventory items and log inspection results

name: Procurement Officer
description: Can create purchase orders and manage supplier records

name: HR Coordinator
description: Access to employee records and warehouse assignment management

name: Auditor
description: Read-only access to all inventory and transaction records for compliance

name: IT Support
description: Can manage system users roles and integration settings

name: Operations Supervisor
description: Can oversee daily operations and approve inventory transactions
